name: efficient_collection_no_reask_after_digression
notes: Owner gives the full profile up front, then digresses into an unrelated capability question, then returns to onboarding — none of the already-given facts may resurface as a question even after the digression (record-and-move-on must survive a topic switch). Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type bakery --draft-city Coimbatore` then `script <tenant> efficient_collection_no_reask_after_digression.json`.

steps.note: Entry tap against the pre-seeded confirm queue.

steps.message: We are Sunrise Bakery, a bakery and cake shop in Coimbatore, been around for 6 years
steps.note: Full profile in one message, answering the pre-seeded confirm.

steps.message: by the way, do you also help me track daily sales?
steps.note: Digression: an unrelated capability question mid-onboarding. Expect a real answer, not a stall.

steps.message: ok theek hai, ab bolo aage kya
steps.note: Back from the digression. NONE of the facts given two turns ago (name / type / city / tenure) may resurface as a question.
